subject: feat(dashboard): replace Phase 1 spinners with pre-aggregated data for all tabs
body:
Instead of showing loading spinners during Phase 1 (summary loaded, commits
still fetching), tabs now render real charts and breakdowns from the
pre-aggregated summary data that's already available.

Tab fallbacks:
- TagsTab: summary.tagBreakdown → full doughnut chart + tag list
- HealthTab: urgency/impact/risk/debt breakdowns from summary (trend charts
  and per-contributor sections deferred to Phase 2). Fixed hooks violation.
- ContributorsTab: summary.contributors[] → "Who Does What" cards + chart
- SecurityTab: summary.security_events → count + event list
- TimingTab: summary.hourlyHeatmap (new) → full 24x7 heatmap + bar charts
- ProjectsTab: summary.repoCommitCounts (new) → instant commit counts
- DiscoverTab: retains spinner (needs per-commit stats)

Added calcRepoCommitCounts() and calcHourlyHeatmap() to aggregate script.
Updated HealthWorkPatterns, RiskAssessment, DebtBalance to handle optional
click handlers during Phase 1.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01RbDmv8obRPnToLezqSGmHg
title: replace Phase 1 spinners with pre-aggregated data for all tabs
